name: Chenghe Acquisition II Co. Class A Ordinary Shares
summary: Chenghe Acquisition II Co. is a blank check company (SPAC) formed to acquire businesses. The company seeks to identify and complete a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. These companies are typically formed to raise capital through an initial public offering (IPO) for the purpose of acquiring an existing company.
